SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-06-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:57am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk Jean Kong, Not reported, D525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.
Appellant, NTK Constructions Inc. appears by owner/Vice President, Sammy Kwok;
Respondent, Walter A. Flores appears as pro per. Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Myles.
Judge goes through the exhibits received from Small Claims Department appellant.

11:30am
